note: Run-side data only (no plotting). mean_step_ms excludes the first 2 warmup steps; peak memory is nvidia-smi-sampled, baseline-subtracted per GPU. PARTIAL SNAPSHOT: after the fp32 stage-0 entry completed, physical GPU 1 hard-faulted ('GPU requires reset' — needs root nvidia-smi -r / reboot), leaving 7 usable CUDA devices, so the remaining world-8 entries could not be measured and were dropped rather than recorded as code failures. Full W8 stage-equivalence loss/timing tables from the pre-fault verification runs, and the complete measured W4 curve (bench_zero_world4.json), are in docs/ai/zero_multigpu_rewrite_2026-07-14.md. Rerun after GPU reset: make benchmark-zero BENCH_ZERO_WORLD=8
